viz_sub_by_path.title: Data Points by Subscription & Encoding Path

options.query: | mstats count("cisco.content.five-seconds") as c WHERE index=cisco_mdt BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as label | eval value=label | fields label value | sort label

| mstats latest("cisco.content.mdt-connections.conn-id.port") as Port latest("cisco.content.mdt-connections.index") as "Conn Index" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.mdt-connections.state_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "Connection State" | fields Switch "Connection State"] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.mdt-connections.peer-id_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "Peer ID" | fields Switch "Peer ID"] | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.mdt-connections.conn-id.source-address_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "Source IP" | fields Switch "Source IP"] | stats values(Port) as Port values("Conn Index") as "Conn Index" values("Connection State") as State values("Peer ID") as "Peer ID" values("Source IP") as "Source IP" BY Switch | sort Switch

| mstats count("cisco.content.five-seconds") as dp WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.subscription_id cisco.encoding_path cisco.node_id | rename cisco.subscription_id as "Sub ID" cisco.encoding_path as "Encoding Path" cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch "Sub ID" | table Switch "Sub ID" "Encoding Path" dp | rename dp as "Data Points"
| mstats count("cisco.content.five-seconds") as c WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.encoding_path span=5m | chart limit=15 sum(c) BY _time cisco.encoding_path
| mstats latest("cisco.content.mdt-system-status.subs-max-num") as max_subs WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | stats max(max_subs) as max_subs
| mstats latest("cisco.content.mdt-system-status.subs-valid-num") as valid_subs WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | stats max(valid_subs) as valid_subs

| mstats count("cisco.content.five-seconds") as dp WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.subscription_id cisco.encoding_path cisco.node_id | rename cisco.subscription_id as "Sub ID" cisco.encoding_path as "YANG Path" cisco.node_id as Switch dp as "Data Points" | sort Switch "Sub ID"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.cpu-punt-queue-name_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "CPU Queue" | table Switch "CPU Queue" | sort Switch "CPU Queue"

title: Cisco IOS XE — Telemetry Health
description: MDT Subscription State, Data Volume, Connections, Punt/Inject
